component.name: OpenGG
component.summary: Linux gaming hub — audio mixing, instant replay, device management

description.p: OpenGG is a modular open-source gaming hub for Linux, combining audio mixing, clip capture and replay, and device management.

ul.li: Audio Hub: 5-channel PipeWire mixer (Game/Chat/Media/Aux/Mic) with per-app routing and parametric EQ
Device Manager: Mouse/keyboard configuration via ratbagd, unified RGB lighting control via OpenRGB SDK
Clipping & Replay: GPU-accelerated screen recording via gpu-screen-recorder, clip gallery with FFmpeg trimming and export

screenshot.caption: Audio mixing hub with per-app routing
Clip gallery with replay buffer management

description.p: Initial Flatpak release scaffolding. Key features:

ul.li: GPU-accelerated clip recording and replay buffer
Device RGB and input configuration (requires host ratbagd/OpenRGB)
